🧊 All-Day Comfort – Soft, breathable fabric despite heavyweight build

🔁 Fade-Resistant Print – Design stays fresh even after multiple washes
🚀 Limited Style Drop – Not your regular T-shirt—exclusive vibe
💥 Perfect for Youth & Trendsetters – Designed for those who like bold fashion

name: GORI TEDDY BEAR OVERSIZED T-SHIRT
description:
This oversized T-shirt is made for those who move with discipline and purpose.

Designed with a relaxed fit and clean silhouette, it’s built to be worn daily — without noise, without distraction.

GORI represents silent work and self-made confidence.

* Oversized fit  
* Soft, breathable cotton  
* Minimal design  
* Everyday comfort  
* Made for disciplined, self-made youth

Fit: Oversized  
Model wears: L  
For a relaxed look, choose your regular size.

Care Instructions:
* Machine wash cold  
* Wash inside out  
* Do not bleach  
* Dry in shade  

This is more than a T-shirt.
It’s a mindset.

name: Mens Formal Trousers
description:
Crafted with high-quality breathable linen fabric, these trousers deliver a clean tailored fit with superior comfort for all-day wear. The elegant finish, slim straight-cut design, and luxury detailing create a sharp and confident look perfect for office meetings, business events, corporate wear, and formal occasions.

Product Features :
• Premium Linen Blend Fabric
• Elegant Slim Fit Formal Design
• Modern Hook Closure System
• Wrinkle-Resistant Premium Finish
• Soft, Breathable & Comfortable Material
• Ideal for Office, Meetings & Formal Events
• Luxury Tailored Stitching & Detailing
• Stylish Straight Fit with Premium Fall

Perfect For:
Office Wear | Corporate Meetings | Executive Styling | Formal Events | Daily Professional Wear | Business Casual Look

Style Tip:
Pair it with a solid formal shirt and leather shoes for a complete premium corporate look.

name: The Phantom Spray Oversized Shirt
description:
Elevate your wardrobe with the Phantom Spray Oversized Shirt — a statement piece crafted for modern streetwear lovers. Featuring a smoky spray-fade finish on a deep black base, this shirt delivers a refined yet edgy aesthetic.
Designed with an oversized silhouette for maximum comfort and effortless styling, it pairs perfectly with cargos, denim, or layered street fits.
✔ Premium oversized fit
✔ Unique spray-fade detailing
✔ Minimal luxury aesthetic
✔ Soft & breathable fabric

name: Men's Shorts
description:
premium men’s active gym shorts designed for training, workouts, running, sports, and everyday casual wear. 

Crafted with lightweight breathable fabric, these shorts keep you cool, dry, and comfortable even during intense workout sessions.

Product Features:
✔ Lightweight & Breathable Fabric
✔ Sweat-Absorb Technology for All-Day Comfort
✔ Dual Zip Pockets for Secure Storage
✔ Stretchable Material for Easy Movement
✔ Stylish Athletic & Casual Look
✔ Durable Stitching for Long-Lasting Use
✔ Perfect for Gym, Running, Sports & Daily Wear
✔ Trendy Modern Fit with Premium Finish

Occasion: Casual, Streetwear, Party, Vacation, Daily Wear
